mapper.select:
SELECT id, username, password, nickname, avatar, role, status, signature, level, points, follow_count, fans_count, like_count, mood_status, mental_tag
FROM user WHERE username = #{username}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user (username, password, nickname) VALUES (#{username}, #{password}, #{nickname})
mapper.select: SELECT username, nickname, avatar, role FROM user WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT id, nickname, avatar, signature, role, status, follow_count, fans_count, like_count, mood_status, mental_tag FROM user where id = #{userId}
SELECT nickname, avatar FROM user WHERE id = #{userId}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user WHERE role = 'user'
AND (username LIKE CONCAT('%',#{keyword},'%') OR nickname LIKE CONCAT('%',#{keyword},'%'))
mapper.update:
UPDATE user
nickname = #{nickname},
avatar = #{avatar},
signature = #{signature},
phone = #{phone},
email = #{email},
mood_status = #{moodStatus},
mental_tag = #{mentalTag},
update_time = NOW()
WHERE id = #{id}
